signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in with your email and password to continue.
signIn.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
signIn.deletedSuccess: Your account and all of its data have been deleted.
signIn.unverifiedMessage: Your email isn't confirmed yet. Check your inbox, or resend the confirmation link.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Sign up with your email and a password to get started.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.descriptionBefore: We sent a confirmation link to
checkEmail.descriptionAfter: . Click the link to activate your account.

errors.exists: If an account already exists for this email, check your inbox for a confirmation link, or try signing in.
errors.weakPassword: That password doesn't meet the requirements above.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verify.title: Enter your code
verify.descriptionAfter: . Enter it below to confirm your account.

errors.invalid: That code is invalid or has expired. Check it and try again, or resend a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.descriptionAfter: , we sent a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.

invalid.title: Link expired or invalid
invalid.description: This password reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one to try again.

resetPassword.error: Could not update your password. Please try again.

enterCode.title: Enter your code
enterCode.descriptionAfter: . Enter it below to reset your password.
enterCode.invalid: That code is invalid or has expired. Check it and try again, or resend a new one.

onboarding.title: Finish setting up your profile
onboarding.description: Tell Rinciku about your income and budget cycle so we can tailor the dashboard to you.
onboarding.saveError: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

account.title: What should we call you?
account.description: This is the name Rinciku will use to greet you.

currency.title: Pick your base currency
currency.description: Your dashboard totals are displayed in this currency.

budget.title: Income and budget cycle
budget.description: Your typical monthly income and the day your budget resets.

review.title: Review your spending categories
review.description: We've set up a starting tier and a few categories. Rename, add, or remove any before you finish — you can always change these later.

authCallback.title: Confirmation failed
authCallback.description: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in to resend it, or sign up again.

resend.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before requesting another email.
resend.error: Could not resend the email. Please try again.
resend.confirmationSent: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox.

profileFields.expectedIncomeHint: Your typical monthly income. If you have multiple streams, enter your main one — log others on the Incomes page.
profileFields.cycleStartDayHint: Day of the month your budget resets (1–28).

profileDetails.title: Profile
profileDetails.description: How you appear in Rinciku and the email tied to your account.
profileDetails.emailHint: Your sign-in email can't be changed here.
profileDetails.updateError: Could not update your profile. Please try again.

financial.title: Financial preferences
financial.description: How Rinciku frames your budget, income, and monthly cycle.
financial.changeCurrencyDescription: Historical totals will be displayed in the new currency going forward. Past row data is not modified.
financial.updateError: Could not update your preferences. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.description: Set a new password for signing in to your account.

dangerZone.title: Delete account
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all of your data — expenses, incomes, categories, budgets, and chats. This can't be undone.
dangerZone.dialogDescriptionBefore: This permanently removes your account and every record tied to it. To confirm, type
